domain: Iraqi maqam (UNESCO ICH 400+ years; codified Baghdadi suite — tahrir vocal intro + muhasaba dialogue + taslim closure; qari' solo + Chalghi Baghdadi ensemble — santur, joza, riqq, dumbuk; tarjamah 'translation' = ensemble recapitulates vocalist's melody)
specific_mechanism: MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH-DIALOGUE: solo-LLM + K-ensemble-LLM call-response with modal-shared embedding constraint + tarjamah-translation echo. (1) Designate 1 qari'-LLM as solo lead emitting unconstrained generative phrases L_t. (2) K instrumentalist-LLMs share modal constraint embedding e_maqam (fixed at start of session). (3) Each instrumentalist responds to L_t with either drone(L_t) (echo e_maqam without paraphrase) OR tarjamah(L_t) (paraphrase L_t in own style). (4) Choice gating: random or content-driven (high-novelty phrase → all tarjamah; low-novelty → drone). (5) Closure phase (taslim): all-LLM converge to canonical low-tonic terminal embedding e_tonic. (6) Each LLM biased toward modal-shared embedding throughout — soft constraint.
llm_application: MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH-DIALOGUE solo + K-ensemble LLM call-response + modal-shared embedding constraint + tarjamah-translation paraphrase echo + drone-OR-tarjamah per-instrumentalist gate + taslim closure. Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI. R403 WELSH-PENILLION (closest — solo respondent, but no K-ensemble + no modal-shared embedding). R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE. R443 ALUNA-COUNCIL. R449 MAPUCHE-PURRUN. R463 HOKULEA-CREW. R465 SALGAN. Differs from MALLM 2410.22932 (multi-agent LLM dialogue — closest but no modal-shared constraint + no drone/tarjamah split). Captain Agent (nested team building). Communication-Centric Survey. MultiAgentESC. Differs by MODAL-SHARED EMBEDDING CONSTRAINT + DRONE-OR-TARJAMAH PER-INSTRUMENTALIST + TASLIM CONVERGENCE CLOSURE.
novelty_claim: MALLM + Captain Agent + Communication-Centric Survey + MultiAgentESC cover multi-agent LLM call-response paradigm. MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH-DIALOGUE adds (a) modal-shared constraint embedding bias + (b) drone-vs-tarjamah per-instrumentalist response choice + (c) taslim canonical-tonic convergence closure. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: iraqi maqam tahrir muhasaba taslim suite
